Shirts you'll reach for first.

Heavyweight organic cotton. Honest construction. A fit that outlasts the season — designed in SF, worn everywhere.

/ the story

We refused to make a shirt that falls apart.

Meridian started with one problem: the perfect tee that went thin and shapeless after a single season. Two years later, we'd sourced long-staple organic cotton, dialed in a heavier 240gsm knit, and built collars that hold their roll.

We cut and finish every shirt in small runs. No endless SKUs. No fast-fashion churn. Just the essentials, restocked instead of replaced.

/ the collection

Five shirts.
Zero filler.

A deliberately small range. Every one earns its spot in the drawer.

01

The Everyday Tee

240gsm organic combed cotton, classic or boxy. The one you reach for first.

Heavyweight knit
02

The Washed Oxford

Soft from day one, with a structured collar that keeps its roll.

Midweight 140gsm
03

Heavyweight Crew

Structured, opaque, built to hold shape through years of wash days.

Structured knit
04

Linen Camp Shirt

Breathable European linen, relaxed through the body, ready for summer.

Pure linen
05

Custom + Monogram

Add a monogram online, or talk small-run embroidery for teams.

Made to order
★

Restocked, not churned

What works comes back. What doesn't, doesn't. Sign up for drop alerts.

Drop list open
/ why meridian

The difference you don't see.

Anyone can sell a plain shirt. These four details are why ours come back from the wash looking new.

01

Long-staple cotton

Smoother, stronger fibres that resist pilling for years.

02

Pre-shrunk

Garment-washed before you see them — what you try on, you keep.

03

Reinforced

Double-stitched stress points and taped shoulders hold shape.

04

Small runs

We make less, more carefully — and bring back what works.

/ how it works

Drawer to doorstep.

01

Find your fit

Take the 30-second fit quiz online, or book a fitting at the Valencia St flagship.

→
02

Choose your shirts

Order online or in-store. We keep the line tight on purpose, so the choice is easy.

→
03

Wear them in

Free 30-day returns and free repairs on seams and buttons, for the life of the shirt.

/ good to know

FAQ

What weight is the cotton?+
Our tees are a heavyweight 240gsm organic combed cotton; oxfords are a midweight 140gsm washed cotton. Both stay opaque and hold their shape.
How do your shirts fit?+
Classic and boxy fits. Every product page lists full measurements, or book a flagship fitting and we'll size you in person.
Do they shrink?+
Everything is pre-shrunk and garment-washed, so what you try on is what you keep. Wash cold, hang or tumble low.
What's your return policy?+
Free 30-day returns on unworn shirts, plus free repairs on seams and buttons for the life of the shirt.
Do you do custom or team orders?+
Yes — add a monogram online, or talk to us about small-run embroidery for teams, events, and gifts.
/ where we serve

Nationwide online.
SF in person.

Free carbon-neutral shipping across the U.S. The Valencia St flagship is a quick walk for these neighborhoods.
